raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "cross-instance handoff protocol", "issue": "No cryptographic integrity check on zip transfers between browser-Atlas and Code-Atlas. Forged payloads or manipulated perspective names can bypass validation.", "recommended_fix": "Sign each zip with instance-specific key; verify hash + signature before processing. Log hash, timestamp, instance ID to zeus.governance_events."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "perspective-name validation", "issue": "Name drift (e.g., 'product') indicates identity confusion; in multi-instance flow, this risks routing to wrong skill face.", "recommended_fix": "Enforce authoritative name from dispatcher; reject or rewrite mismatched names; log perspective_name_drift as security event."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "CEO-courier vulnerability", "issue": "Physical courier is single point of compromise. Malware on CEO device could alter payloads.", "recommended_fix": "Treat CEO device as potentially hostile; validate all inputs at entry points; isolate execution contexts."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: No cryptographic integrity check on zip transfers between browser-Atlas and Code-Atlas. Forged payloads or manipulated perspective names can bypass validation.
findings.recommended_fix: Sign each zip with instance-specific key; verify hash + signature before processing. Log hash, timestamp, instance ID to zeus.governance_events.

findings.issue: Name drift (e.g., 'product') indicates identity confusion; in multi-instance flow, this risks routing to wrong skill face.
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce authoritative name from dispatcher; reject or rewrite mismatched names; log perspective_name_drift as security event.

findings.issue: Physical courier is single point of compromise. Malware on CEO device could alter payloads.
findings.recommended_fix: Treat CEO device as potentially hostile; validate all inputs at entry points; isolate execution contexts.
